'''Biosh''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. The second world in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Biosh was a barren ball of rock. It had little to any [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and no life.

{{Planet-stub}}
